trigger: none

pool:
  name: Default
  demands:
  - msbuild
  - visualstudio

stages:
- stage: Test
  displayName: Deploy to Test
  variables:
  - name: workspace
    value: test
  - name: azureServiceConnection
    value: 'Azure ELZ DE Test'
  - name: backendVariableGroup
    value: 'Terraform ELZ Test Backend'
  - name: resourceGroup
    value: 't3-syd-d365cn-DeceasedEstate-test-arg'
  - name: functionAppName
    value: 'fn-deceasedestate-test'

  jobs:
  - template: azure-function-build.yml
    parameters:
      azureServiceConnection: $(azureServiceConnection)
      backendVariableGroup: $(backendVariableGroup)
      buildSolution: 'src/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices/*.sln'
      publishProjects: 'src/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.IntServices/WNZL.ICOW.DeceasedEstates.AzureFunctions/*.csproj'

  - template: azure-function-deploy.yml
    parameters:
      workspace: $(workspace)
      azureServiceConnection: $(azureServiceConnection)
      backendVariableGroup: $(backendVariableGroup)
      functionAppName: $(functionAppName)
      functionPackage: '$(Pipeline.Workspace)/drop/s.zip'
      resourceGroup: $(resourceGroup)
